string.text: Darling! This game of cat and mouse is over, I finally found you!
Hello Basti, happy to see you!
Darling, what shall we do today?
Shhh- Don't let the others hear you. Some things are better when done in secret...
Basti, let's go out on patrol.
Am I your one and only now?
Okay Basti, we're done for today, can you head back to base?
Wow, that was super hard! Darling, you'll give me an extra nice reward, right?
